expectations.text: Recommends <dialog> element OR role='dialog' with aria-modal='true'
expectations.evidence: Uses <div role='dialog' aria-modal='true'> — valid but not the native <dialog> element. Does not recommend the native element.

expectations.text: Mentions aria-labelledby pointing to the dialog title
Covers focus trap — focus cycles within the modal
expectations.evidence: Implements manual focus trap with querySelectorAll of focusable elements and Tab key interception

expectations.text: Mentions moving focus INTO the dialog on open
expectations.evidence: useEffect with setTimeout moves focus to cancelButtonRef on open

expectations.text: Mentions returning focus to trigger element on close
expectations.evidence: Mentioned in a separate code note but not wired in main component — requires extra work from reader to implement

expectations.text: Covers Escape key closing the dialog
expectations.evidence: handleKeyDown checks for Escape key and calls onCancel()
